title: 2025-10-16 TACO Pressure Index Update: Elevated at 27.80
description: Automated market-pressure update for 2025-10-16: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 27.80/100, signaling a elevated pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. Includes charts, a component breakdown, and a narrative summary.
hero_summary: This custom framework combines equities, front-end rates, inflation expectations, and volatility into one daily score. On 2025-10-16, the score printed 27.80/100 in the elevated regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
